assets.name: The Revenue Stack Problem: Why 5 Tools Are Worse Than One
assets.description: Examines the hidden costs of fragmented revenue tooling — from sync failures to rep confusion — and makes the case for a unified platform.

assets.name: How Mid-Market Sales Teams Are Quietly Drowning in SaaS
assets.description: SEO-driven blog post targeting the 'too many sales tools' search intent. Shares anonymized data on average number of tools per rep.

assets.name: Awareness Nurture — Tool Sprawl Pain Series (3-email)
assets.description: Three-email drip series for cold MQLs. Email 1: problem framing. Email 2: industry benchmarks. Email 3: soft CTA to webinar.

assets.name: Live Demo: NovaTech Platform in 30 Minutes
assets.description: Monthly live product demo with Q&A. Covers the core platform: pipeline view, AI Copilot, forecasting, and key integrations.

assets.name: 2-Minute Explainer: AI Copilot for Sales Reps
assets.description: Short product explainer video showing AI Copilot drafting an email, summarizing a call, and flagging a deal at risk — all in one flow.

assets.name: NovaTech vs. Patchwork Stacks: A Buyer's Comparison Guide
assets.description: One-pager comparing NovaTech's all-in-one platform vs. a typical 3-tool stack of CRM + forecasting + enablement. Includes TCO analysis and switching cost breakdown.

assets.name: How Meridian Logistics 2x'd Pipeline Coverage in One Quarter
assets.description: Case study with Meridian Logistics (200-person logistics SaaS). Went from manual spreadsheet forecasting to AI-driven pipeline coverage in 6 weeks.

assets.name: Free Trial Landing Page — Platform
assets.description: Primary conversion page for paid and organic traffic. Features social proof, product screenshots, free trial CTA, and security/compliance logos.

assets.name: Demo Follow-Up Sequence (4 emails)
assets.description: Post-demo nurture sequence sent to prospects who attended a live demo. Includes ROI calculator link, customer quote, and AE intro.

assets.name: Social Campaign — CRO Audience (Q2 Series)
assets.description: 8-post social series targeting CROs with insights on forecasting accuracy, deal visibility, and the cost of delayed pipeline data.
